meta.title: Home
meta.description: The BLEU community platform for sharing knowledge, learning together, and building the future of technology.

hero.title: Building • Learning • Exploring • Uniting
hero.description: A community-driven blog for developers. Share your knowledge, learn from others, and build the future together.

latestPosts.title: Latest Posts
latestPosts.emptyTitle: No blogs yet. Be the first to contribute!

openSource.title: Open Source Blog
openSource.description: This blog is fully open source. Anyone can contribute by opening a Pull Request on GitHub. Your blog post will be reviewed by the community and published on merge.

write.title: Fork & Write
write.description: Fork the repo and add your Markdown file to content/blogs/.

pr.title: Open a PR
pr.description: Submit your pull request. The community will review and provide feedback.

publish.title: Merge = Published
publish.description: Once approved and merged, your blog is live! GitHub Actions handles deployment.
